title: Italian Borscht Risotto
description: A unique twist on the classic Italian risotto, incorporating the flavors of Ukrainian borscht. This hearty dish is perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth and bring to a simmer.
Add the borscht mix and cook according to the package instructions.
Add the floral rice to the saucepan and cook according to the package instructions.
Stir in the shaved parmesan cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
